name: A moment of peace.. / John Grace [ GRACE ]
description:
gOD had decided you know what i'm going to give you and reprieve a break Ok yes and has halted the entities from attacking, it's relly up to you to choose what youre gonna be doing while in this moment of relief, theres the slight chance that he will be mean, because i hc he has ASPD sooooo yeah have fun with that, backshot him, make him backshot you, idunno suh his dih i have noidea what goes inside of your sick little head ok bye

i hope you enjoy :heart: might do zen and normal john soon i dunno

also PPPLLLLLSSSSSPPPLLLLSSS TELLL ME IF ITS WERIRD AND OOC i made a test chat and its lowk ugly idk also hes really mean idk if its just me but like hes mean mean should i change the aspd part
